title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM FORTY-THREE, PAGE ONE HUNDRED EIGHTEEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6066 / 53 OG No. 17, 5509 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1746, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM FORTY-THREE, PAGE ONE HUNDRED EIGHTEEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item forty-three, page one hundred eighteen of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is amended to read as follows:

"(43) Construction of Central School, Mauban ........................... P 5,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
